title: Cloud & DevOps
short_description: Cloud infrastructure setup and DevOps practices for scalable, reliable applications.
content:
## Cloud & DevOps Services

We help you leverage cloud technologies and implement DevOps practices for faster delivery.

### Cloud Services

- Cloud architecture design
- AWS, Azure, Google Cloud
- Serverless computing
- Cloud migration

### DevOps Practices

- CI/CD pipelines
- Containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
- Infrastructure as Code
- Monitoring & logging
- Automated testing
